signals.npcLine: Crypto shadows flicker, market pulse rises faintly under neon haze.
signals.questPulse: Scan for flickering tokens, fear chills the trading net.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment deep in fear; digital currencies breathe uneasy tonight.
signals.clueEvent: Whispers of token surges disrupt calm, data streams glitch briefly.

signals.npcLine: Rogue tokens slip through protocols; eyes sharp on AAVE and RAVE trails.
signals.questPulse: Infiltrate dark markets, track ASTEROID and PENGU activity spikes.
signals.worldFeed: Market nodes overwhelmed, unknown scripts twist trending cryptos.
signals.clueEvent: Signals picked from ASTEROID cluster; anomaly in market flux.

signals.npcLine: Fear grips digitized souls; rising market caps mask lurking risks.
signals.questPulse: Decrypt cryptic signals within rising cap echoes, beware traps.
signals.worldFeed: Fear index rising, masked by a thin veil of growth.
signals.clueEvent: Cryptic pattern noticed in multiple tokens, potential breach ahead.

signals.npcLine: Seek the ghost in the trending code; BTC fades in shadow.
signals.questPulse: Trace BTC's slow fade, unravel silence behind spikes.
signals.worldFeed: Trending cryptos climb erratically; BTC wanes as new stars flare.
signals.clueEvent: Subtle shifts in top symbols hint at hidden market war.

signals.npcLine: Coders whisper—new market front opening; luck rides on ASTEROID.
signals.questPulse: Assist rogue trader tracking PENGU's sudden rise.
signals.worldFeed: AAVE and RAVE chatter stirs, small players on the move.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted message found pointing to volatile micro-markets.
